# Omni Shine Cleaning

> Family-run professional cleaning service based in Oldham, Greater Manchester. Founded in 2026 by Sangita Chavda. Serves 17 towns across Oldham, Rochdale and Tameside boroughs. Contact form only — no phone. Email: info@omnishine.co.uk.

## About
- Business name: Omni Shine Cleaning
- Founder: Sangita Chavda
- Founded: 2026
- Location: Oldham, Greater Manchester, United Kingdom
- Contact email: info@omnishine.co.uk
- Opening hours: Mon–Fri 5pm–9pm, Sat–Sun 8am–9pm

## Services and starting prices
- Domestic cleaning: from £18/hr (two-hour minimum)
- Commercial cleaning: from £22/hr
- Deep cleaning: from £150 fixed
- End of tenancy cleaning: from £180 fixed
- After-builders cleaning: from £200 fixed

## Areas served (17 towns)
Oldham, Shaw, Royton, Chadderton, Failsworth, Lees, Uppermill, Saddleworth, Springhead, Greenfield, Grotton, Moorside, Rochdale, Delph, Middleton, Ashton-under-Lyne, Mossley.

## Payment
Bank transfer, cash, card, Stripe link. Invoices for commercial clients with 7-day terms.

## Guarantees
- 72-hour re-clean guarantee on any missed areas
- Eco-friendly products included, fragrance-free on request
- Same cleaner each visit wherever possible
- No weekend surcharge
- No travel charge inside the 17-town service area
